gold.rationale: 文本的核心信息是对“Tornado Emergency”概念的准确认读，并结合美国多地同期强对流天气背景说明其为何成为社交平台热词；这一表述与美国国家气象预警体系的常见定义、伊利诺伊州局地风暴破坏报道、以及夏威夷受Kona Low系统影响的信息相符。所配图片分别对应受损现场、预警分级示意、风暴破坏实例和灾害监测画面，未见图文错配、伪造或误导性改写，因此应判定为属实。

atomic_points.post_summary: 文章解释了美国社交媒体上频繁出现的“龙卷风紧急状态”术语，区分了气象预警的三个层级，并报道了伊利诺伊州、新泽西州及夏威夷群岛在3月11日前后的龙卷风和强对流天气情况。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 这两天，美国社交平台上“Tornado Emergency”一词频繁出现，中文通常可译作“龙卷风紧急状态”或“龙卷风紧急警报”。
atoms: 美国社交平台上频繁出现'Tornado Emergency'一词
'Tornado Emergency'中文可译作'龙卷风紧急状态'
'Tornado Emergency'中文可译作'龙卷风紧急警报'

sentence_level.sentence_text: 据外媒在3月11日前后的报道，随着美国中西部、东部以及太平洋方向部分地区强对流天气趋于活跃，公众对龙卷风预警分级的关注明显上升。
atoms: 外媒在3月11日前后报道了相关天气情况
美国中西部部分地区强对流天气趋于活跃
美国东部部分地区强对流天气趋于活跃
美国太平洋方向部分地区强对流天气趋于活跃
公众对龙卷风预警分级的关注明显上升

sentence_level.sentence_text: 由于各州面临的天气形势并不一样，一些地方已经出现龙卷风造成的破坏，另一些地方则还处在强风暴和龙卷风风险提示阶段。
atoms: 各州面临的天气形势不一样
一些地方已经出现龙卷风造成的破坏
另一些地方还处在强风暴和龙卷风风险提示阶段

sentence_level.sentence_text: 在美国的气象预警体系中，公众最容易混淆的，往往是Watch、Warning和Emergency这三个层级。
atoms: Watch、Warning和Emergency是美国气象预警体系的三个层级
公众容易混淆这三个层级

sentence_level.sentence_text: Tornado Watch一般表示“具备发生条件”，也就是大气环境支持龙卷风形成，相关地区居民应提高警惕，持续关注天气变化；
atoms: Tornado Watch表示大气环境支持龙卷风形成
Tornado Watch表示相关地区居民应提高警惕
Tornado Watch表示居民应持续关注天气变化

sentence_level.sentence_text: Tornado Warning则意味着风险进一步升级，即已经观测到龙卷风，或雷达信号显示龙卷风很可能正在形成，并将影响某一区域，这时就需要立刻采取避险措施；
atoms: Tornado Warning意味着风险进一步升级
Tornado Warning表示已经观测到龙卷风
Tornado Warning表示雷达信号显示龙卷风很可能正在形成
Tornado Warning表示龙卷风将影响某一区域
Tornado Warning表示需要立刻采取避险措施

sentence_level.sentence_text: 至于Tornado Emergency，则比普通龙卷风警报更高一级，而且启动次数极少，通常只用于已经确认有大型且可能致命的龙卷风在地面活动，或者有极强雷达证据表明其正在造成严重生命威胁和灾难性破坏。
atoms: Tornado Emergency比普通龙卷风警报更高一级
Tornado Emergency启动次数极少
Tornado Emergency用于确认有大型且可能致命的龙卷风在地面活动
Tornado Emergency用于雷达证据表明龙卷风正在造成严重生命威胁
Tornado Emergency用于雷达证据表明龙卷风正在造成灾难性破坏

sentence_level.sentence_text: 换句话说，“龙卷风紧急警报”并不意味着当天所有地区都进入这一等级，它只会在极端罕见、危险程度极高的局部情况下发布。
atoms: '龙卷风紧急警报'并不意味着当天所有地区都进入这一等级
'龙卷风紧急警报'只在极端罕见、危险程度极高的局部情况下发布

sentence_level.sentence_text: 伊利诺伊州在3月11日凌晨的这轮天气过程中，已经出现了实际影响。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 初步信息显示，这次龙卷风造成部分房屋、农场设施、粮仓和树木受损，路径长度及风速等数据也已纳入后续调查记录。

atoms: 多地天气风险上升导致'Tornado Emergency'成为美国社交平台热词

sentence_level.sentence_text: 在防灾避险方面，美国气象和应急部门长期强调的原则一直比较明确：如果住宅或建筑物内有地下室，应优先进入地下室避险；
atoms: 美国气象和应急部门强调：如果住宅有地下室，应优先进入地下室避险

sentence_level.sentence_text: 如果没有地下室，就应立即前往建筑最低层，选择远离窗户、靠近房屋中心的位置，最好是小房间、走廊或卫生间等相对封闭区域，尽量降低飞散物和玻璃破裂带来的伤害风险。

paragraph_level: 美国中西部、东部及太平洋方向强对流天气活跃，导致公众对龙卷风预警分级关注上升。
公众容易混淆Watch、Warning和Emergency三个预警层级，需明确其区别。
Tornado Emergency是最高级别，仅在确认有大型致命龙卷风或造成严重生命威胁时启动，启动次数极少。
伊利诺伊州麦迪逊县Moro一带在3月11日遭遇EF1级龙卷风，造成房屋、农场设施等受损，暂无严重伤亡通报。
伊利诺伊州圣克莱尔县东南部农村地区报告风暴破坏，国家气象局损害评估团队正在勘察以确认是否发生龙卷风。
新泽西州在3月11日面临强风暴、大风、冰雹及孤立龙卷风风险，红十字会提醒公众关注预警并下载应急应用。
夏威夷群岛受'Kona Low'风暴系统影响，面临强降雨、山洪、大风及龙卷风等连锁风险。
社交媒体上'Tornado Emergency'成为热词是因为多地天气风险上升，但公众需区分'可能发生'、'已警报'和'极端紧急'。
防灾原则建议有地下室者先进入地下室，无地下室者前往最低层远离窗户的封闭区域避险。
提前了解预警等级并准备接收通知的手机应用和应急用品比临时判断更重要。

visual_indicators.scene_description: An aerial photograph showing the aftermath of a severe storm in a rural area. A large tree has snapped over a house, and a red barn has lost its roof. Emergency vehicles, including a police car and fire truck, are present on the road amidst scattered debris.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image visually confirms the post's description of storm damage in Illinois, specifically showing the types of destruction (roof loss, snapped trees) mentioned.

visual_indicators.scene_description: An educational infographic explaining the three levels of tornado warnings: Watch, Warning, and Emergency. Each level is color-coded and includes a description of the conditions and required actions.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: TORNADO TERMINOLOGY | JAN DILS ATTORNEYS AT LAW, LLC | STORM TEAM | WATCH BE PREPARED! | WARNING TAKE ACTION! | EMERGENCY TAKE ACTION! | CONDITIONS ARE FAVORABLE FOR TORNADOES TO FORM | TORNADO SPOTTED OR INDICATED BY RADAR | SEVERE THREAT TO HUMAN LIFE AND CATASTROPHIC DAMAGE
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image directly illustrates the definitions of 'Watch', 'Warning', and 'Emergency' discussed in the post text.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A photo of a large commercial building that has been stripped of its roof, leaving only the twisted metal frame and wooden trusses exposed. A semi-trailer and a pickup truck are parked nearby on a muddy lot.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: This image supports the post's mention of damage to 'farm facilities, silos, and buildings' in Illinois.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A screenshot of a weather monitoring software interface showing a map of Hawaii. The map displays a forecast for cumulative rainfall over three days, with color-coded zones indicating expected precipitation amounts.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: DisasterAWARE Pro | Cumulative Rainfall Forecast (3 Day) | 0 - 0.5 inches | 0.5 - 1 inches | ... | > 30 inches | HAWAII | 19 | 50 | 56
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image provides visual evidence for the post's claim that Hawaii was affected by a 'Kona Low' system bringing heavy rain.

cross_modal: image_1 is presented as visual evidence of the EF1 tornado damage in Madison County, Illinois, described in the text.
image_2 is presented as visual evidence of the severe threat and catastrophic damage associated with the Tornado Emergency level.
image_3 is presented as visual evidence of the infrastructure damage (trailer roof) mentioned in the text regarding storm destruction.
image_4 is presented as visual evidence of the rainfall forecast and weather systems affecting Hawaii mentioned in the text.

retrieved_evidence.text: 据伊利诺伊州应急管理部门和当地媒体 3 月 11 日报道，伊利诺伊州麦迪逊县莫罗地区当日遭遇一场被初步评估为 EF1 级的龙卷风袭击。现场图片显示，部分房屋屋顶受损，农场建筑和树木被不同程度刮倒，局部地区出现短时停电。据当地官员介绍，截至目前尚未接获严重人员伤亡的即时报告，损失统计和等级评估仍在由国家气象局及县级相关部门联合开展，后续情况将根据调查结果进一步公布。
伊利诺伊州Moro地区在3月11日前后遭遇强对流天气，据相关人员介绍，当地确认受到一次EF1级龙卷风影响，导致多处房屋屋顶被掀翻，外墙受损，院落中的农用机械和棚屋倒塌或移位，农田周边树木折断。美国国家气象局指出，这类中等强度龙卷风仍可对轻型建筑和农场设施造成显著破坏，也使公众更加关注“Tornado Emergency”这类极端等级提示在预警体系中的作用。
新泽西州红十字会 3 月 11 日通过社交平台及社区渠道向部分地区居民发布提醒，指出当日晚间和次日清晨局地可能遭遇强风暴天气过程。据该机构介绍，提醒内容包括呼吁民众密切关注当地气象部门发布的龙卷风警报、强雷暴预警等信息，并提前检查家庭应急包、手机电量及收音设备状况。红十字会同时建议社区照顾老年人和行动不便者，必要时协助其了解避险路线和可利用的临时避难场所。
国家气象局圣路易斯办公室近日表示，伊利诺伊州圣克莱尔县东南部部分农村地区在强对流天气过程中出现明显风暴破坏迹象，包括树木折断、屋顶受损及农用设施受影响等。据气象部门介绍，已派出损害评估团队赶赴当地，对倒伏痕迹和建筑破坏模式进行现场勘查，以判断是否有龙卷风在地面形成并造成破坏。相关人员指出，目前尚无定论，正式结论将待勘验数据汇总分析后再对外发布。
太平洋灾害中心近日发布情况说明称，一个缓慢移动的“科纳低压”风暴系统正影响整个夏威夷群岛，预计在未来一段时间内持续带来强降雨、山洪、破坏性大风和强雷暴活动。据该中心专家介绍，相关系统还可能在局地伴随冰雹和龙卷风现象，部分山区和低洼地带面临较高的洪涝与滑坡风险。当地政府已呼吁居民减少不必要外出，关注山洪预警和天气更新，并遵从相关部门发布的道路封闭和疏散指示。
美国多家气象及应急管理机构近日重申，在强对流天气和龙卷风风险上升时，应严格遵循基础避险常识。据专家介绍，若建筑物配有地下室，建议人员优先前往地下室避险，尽量远离窗户和外墙；在没有地下室的住宅或公共建筑内，则应快速前往最低楼层、靠近建筑中心的小房间或内侧走廊，借助坚固家具进行遮蔽。相关部门同时提醒民众提前熟悉家庭应急预案，以便在预警发布后第一时间作出反应。
美国气象部门近日在通报中强调，所谓“龙卷风紧急状态”或“龙卷风紧急警报”是一类比普通龙卷风警报更高一级的特别提示，仅在极端危险情况下才会启用。据多名气象专家介绍，该提示通常在人口较为密集地区已出现重大龙卷风威胁、并被认为可能造成严重破坏和人员伤亡时发布，意在强调事态的紧迫性，敦促当地居民立刻采取最严格的避险措施。相关应用标准由国家气象局及地方预警机构依据实时监测综合研判。

An EF1 tornado struck the Moro, Illinois, area in Madison County on Wednesday, March 11, 2026. The storm caused significant damage to several homes and farms in the region. Witnesses described terrifying moments as the tornado passed, tearing off roofs, toppling trees, and damaging structures. Emergency crews are assessing the extent of the damage and providing assistance to affected residents. Fortunately, there were no immediate reports of serious injuries, but the community now faces the arduous task of rebuilding. The event serves as a reminder of nature's unpredictable force.

夏威夷群岛在同一时期也面临恶劣天气威胁。根据太平洋灾害中心及其DisasterAWARE平台的监测信息显示，受“Kona Low”低压系统影响，当地部分区域出现累积降雨显著增加、强风和山洪、泥石流等多重风险叠加的情况。监测图层叠加了降雨、风暴和地形等要素，为当地政府和公众提供实时灾害风险概览，尽管与美国本土“Tornado Emergency”所针对的龙卷风灾害类型不同，但同样体现严密的气象与公共安全监测体系。

⚠️ 🚨 Considering today's forecasted weather we could see severe storms in parts of #NJ. Download the free Red Cross Emergency App for weather alerts like tornado warnings, and other helpful features like preparedness checklists. #NJwx

美国国家气象局在近期风暴预报中反复强调，要区分“Tornado Watch”“Tornado Warning”和极少发布的“Tornado Emergency”。据气象播报说明，Watch表示大气条件有利于龙卷风等强对流发展，公众需保持关注；Warning意味着监测雷达或现场目击已表明龙卷风正在发生或即将发生，需立刻进入掩蔽处；而“Tornado Emergency”则是在大型、极危险且可能致命的龙卷风已被确认并正威胁人口稠密区域时才会启用的最高紧迫度警示。

Substantial damage from overnight storm in southeastern St Clair County. Damage in rural Marissa, Lenzburg and St Libory.

National Weather Service's Damage Assessment Team is surveying damage to determine if a tornado touched down.

St. Clair County Emergency Management Director Herb Simmons tells KMOX, with his years of experience, believes the damage looks like tornado destruction.
美国国家气象局及多州应急管理机构近日陆续发布预报称，受强冷暖气团交汇及高空急流等因素影响，本月 11 日前后美国中部、南部及东部部分地区将出现或已经出现强对流天气过程。据有关气象人员介绍，此轮天气过程可能伴随冰雹、雷暴大风及局地龙卷风等强烈天气现象，多地已发布严重雷暴和龙卷风相关预警。相关部门提醒民众密切关注最新天气信息和本地疏散指引，必要时提前做好应急准备。
美国国家气象局本周就龙卷风相关预警分级作进一步说明。据介绍，“龙卷风观察”表示一个区域内已具备形成龙卷风的气象条件，民众需提高警觉；“龙卷风警报”则意味着已通过地面观测或雷达迹象确认该区域存在或极可能出现龙卷风，需要群众立即采取防护行动；而“龙卷风紧急状态”被描述为极端罕见的最高级别警示，多指大型且具有潜在致命风险的龙卷风已经在地面活动，预警区域居民被要求马上前往最安全地点避险。
圣克莱尔县在本轮影响美国中部的强对流过程中出现多处建筑损毁，据当地应急部门介绍，仓储设施和农用建筑屋顶被掀离，部分墙体坍塌，金属板材和木梁被抛散在密苏里河周边地带，道路一度被杂物阻塞。气象部门正通过现场勘查和雷达资料评估是否存在龙卷风落地迹象，并结合是否达到“Tornado Warning”或更高级别警示的条件，进一步厘清此次风暴事件的性质和强度。

Just in Case...

Never hurts to go over Severe Weather safety, especially since we are expecting some severe storms later today. The potential is there for a Tornado or two. 

A Watch means 'watch'... but a Warning means take action now. 

An Emergency (God Forbid) is exceptionally rare for our region, but it's the highest sense of urgency with a tornado warning. This means a large and potentially deadly tornado is confirmed to be on the ground. There were a couple of these issued during the March 2012 Outbreak in Eastern KY and Western WV. 

In regards to your safe spot - a basement is always best, but the lowest floor away from windows near the center of your home isn't a bad second option.

美国中西部、东部及太平洋方向强对流天气活跃，导致公众对龙卷风预警分级关注上升。
公众容易混淆Watch、Warning和Emergency三个预警层级，需明确其区别。
Tornado Emergency是最高级别，仅在确认有大型致命龙卷风或造成严重生命威胁时启动，启动次数极少。
伊利诺伊州麦迪逊县Moro一带在3月11日遭遇EF1级龙卷风，造成房屋、农场设施等受损，暂无严重伤亡通报。
伊利诺伊州圣克莱尔县东南部农村地区报告风暴破坏，国家气象局损害评估团队正在勘察以确认是否发生龙卷风。
新泽西州在3月11日面临强风暴、大风、冰雹及孤立龙卷风风险，红十字会提醒公众关注预警并下载应急应用。
夏威夷群岛受'Kona Low'风暴系统影响，面临强降雨、山洪、大风及龙卷风等连锁风险。
社交媒体上'Tornado Emergency'成为热词是因为多地天气风险上升，但公众需区分'可能发生'、'已警报'和'极端紧急'。
防灾原则建议有地下室者先进入地下室，无地下室者前往最低层远离窗户的封闭区域避险。
提前了解预警等级并准备接收通知的手机应用和应急用品比临时判断更重要。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post text accurately reflects the evidence regarding the weather event timeline, specific locations, damage descriptions, and safety guidelines without any fabrication, distortion, or contextual mismatch.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is a high-quality, factually accurate summary of the retrieved news reports and social media updates regarding the March 11 weather event.

images.scene_description: A wide shot of a rural farm area showing significant storm damage, including a red barn with a torn roof, a white house with debris scattered around, and emergency vehicles (fire truck, police car) on the road.
images.ocr_text: TORNADO TERMINOLOGY | JAN DILS ATTORNEYS AT LAW, LLC | STORM TEAM | WATCH BE PREPARED! | WARNING TAKE ACTION! | EMERGENCY TAKE ACTION! | CONDITIONS ARE FAVORABLE FOR TORNADOES TO FORM | TORNADO SPOTTED OR INDICATED BY RADAR | SEVERE THREAT TO HUMAN LIFE AND CATASTROPHIC DAMAGE
images.v1_evidence: The image is a high-fidelity AI-generated infographic or poster rather than a candid photograph, featuring stylized color-coded boxes, radar graphics, and a glossy layout typical of marketing materials, which contradicts the claim that it is a photo of EF1 tornado damage in Madison County.
images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite graphic overlaying a background photo with large colored banners and text labels ('WATCH', 'WARNING', 'EMERGENCY') that are clearly added in post-production, not physically present in the scene.
images.c_evidence: The image depicts a generic educational poster about tornado terminology, whereas the post claims it shows specific EF1 tornado damage in Madison County, Illinois.
images.explanation: This is a synthetic AI-generated infographic designed to explain tornado terminology, not a photo of the specific storm damage mentioned in the text.

images.scene_description: A close-up view of a severely damaged metal building with its roof structure completely stripped away, exposing the wooden trusses, next to a maroon pickup truck and a white trailer.
images.c_evidence: The image shows a commercial or agricultural building with a stripped roof, which does not match the evidence description of a residential farm in Moro, Illinois, or the specific EF1 damage described.
images.explanation: The image depicts a different type of infrastructure damage (commercial building) than the residential farm damage described in the evidence for the Illinois event.

images.scene_description: A map of Hawaii showing rainfall forecasts and weather icons, with a sidebar displaying a legend for cumulative rainfall in inches.
images.ocr_text: DisasterAWARE Pro® | 23:25 | 06:25 | 23:25 | 13:25 | 09:25 | HAWAII | 50 | 19 | 56 | 0 - 0.5 inches | 0.5 - 1 inches | 1 - 1.5 inches | 1.5 - 2 inches | 2 - 2.5 inches | 2.5 - 3 inches | 3 - 4 inches | 4 - 5 inches | 5 - 6 inches | 6 - 8 inches | 8 - 10 inches | 10 - 15 inches | 15 - 20 inches | 20 - 30 inches | > 30 inches
images.explanation: The image is a legitimate software screenshot that accurately reflects the content described in the evidence regarding Hawaii's weather conditions.

images.scene_description: A white farmhouse with a large tree in the foreground, surrounded by debris and storm damage, with emergency vehicles in the background.
images.c_evidence: The image shows a residential farm scene with a white house and a silo, which corresponds to the description of damage in St. Clair County (Marissa, Lenzburg, St. Libory) rather than the Moro area in Madison County.
images.explanation: The image depicts the specific damage in St. Clair County mentioned in the text, but the post claims it is evidence of the Madison County EF1 tornado, creating a location mismatch.

image_analysis.global_notes: The post uses a mix of synthetic AI-generated infographics (Image 1) and real photos from different locations (Images 2 and 4) to support a narrative about a specific event in Madison County, Illinois.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖子准确解释了美国龙卷风预警分级，并基于可靠新闻来源报道了伊利诺伊州、新泽西州及夏威夷群岛在3月11日前后的真实天气事件和破坏情况，配图均为真实场景或相关图表，与文本内容完全一致。
judge.reasoning_trace: Textual evidence confirms all specific claims about tornadoes, locations, and safety protocols. Visual evidence (images 1-4) aligns perfectly with the text descriptions of storm damage and weather monitoring.
judge.core_claim: The post explains the difference between Tornado Watch, Warning, and Emergency levels, reports on EF1 tornado damage in Illinois (Madison and St. Clair counties) on March 11, mentions storm risks in New Jersey and Hawaii, and provides safety guidelines.
key_subclaims: Tornado Emergency is a rare, high-level alert for confirmed large, deadly tornadoes.
An EF1 tornado hit Moro, Madison County, Illinois on March 11, causing roof and tree damage.
St. Clair County, Illinois reported storm damage where the NWS is assessing if a tornado touched down.
New Jersey faced severe storm risks on March 11.
Hawaii was affected by a 'Kona Low' system bringing heavy rain and storm risks.
Safety guidelines recommend basements or lowest floors away from windows.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post text is fully supported by the retrieved evidence regarding weather events, damage reports, and safety guidelines. All four images are authentic and directly relevant to the text's claims (storm damage in Illinois, infographic on warnings, building damage, and Hawaii rainfall forecast). No fabrication, distortion, or contextual mismatch was found.

image_findings.explanation: The image shows storm damage consistent with the text's description of EF1 tornado impact in Illinois (damaged barn, snapped tree, debris).
The infographic accurately illustrates the definitions of Watch, Warning, and Emergency as described in the text.
The image shows a damaged building structure consistent with the text's mention of infrastructure damage in Illinois.
The screenshot shows a rainfall forecast map for Hawaii, supporting the text's claim about the 'Kona Low' system.
